testcase.name: test_get_user_data[tourist-True]

failure.message: ValueError: invalid literal for int() with base 10: '4229 ― King (+171 to promote)'

testcase.failure:
username = 'tourist', is_valid = True
@pytest.mark.parametrize( "username, is_valid", [ ( "tourist", True ), ( "junah", True ), ( "invalid_username_20240701", False ) ] ) def test_get_user_data(username, is_valid): > user_data = get_user_data(username) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
tests/test_utils.py:24: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
username = 'tourist'
def get_user_data(username: str) -> Optional[UserData]: """Get user data from atcoder""" url = f"https://atcoder.jp/users/{username}" response = requests.get(url)
doc = pq(response.text)
# user not found if doc("div.alert.alert-danger").length > 0: return None
user_data = doc("table.dl-table.mt-2 > tr")
# user is unrated if user_data.length == 0: return UserData(username, "Unrated", 0, 0, "Unrated", 0)
rank = user_data.eq(0).find("td").text() rating = int(user_data.eq(1).find("td > span").text()) > highest_rating = int(user_data.eq(2).find("td > span").text()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E ValueError: invalid literal for int() with base 10: '4229 ― King (+171 to promote)'
layers/util_layer/python/utils.py:81: ValueError

testcase.name: test_get_user_data[junah-True]

failure.message: ValueError: invalid literal for int() with base 10: '1022 ― 5 Kyu (+178 to promote)'

testcase.failure:
username = 'junah', is_valid = True
@pytest.mark.parametrize( "username, is_valid", [ ( "tourist", True ), ( "junah", True ), ( "invalid_username_20240701", False ) ] ) def test_get_user_data(username, is_valid): > user_data = get_user_data(username) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
tests/test_utils.py:24: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
username = 'junah'
def get_user_data(username: str) -> Optional[UserData]: """Get user data from atcoder""" url = f"https://atcoder.jp/users/{username}" response = requests.get(url)
doc = pq(response.text)
# user not found if doc("div.alert.alert-danger").length > 0: return None
user_data = doc("table.dl-table.mt-2 > tr")
# user is unrated if user_data.length == 0: return UserData(username, "Unrated", 0, 0, "Unrated", 0)
rank = user_data.eq(0).find("td").text() rating = int(user_data.eq(1).find("td > span").text()) > highest_rating = int(user_data.eq(2).find("td > span").text()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E ValueError: invalid literal for int() with base 10: '1022 ― 5 Kyu (+178 to promote)'
layers/util_layer/python/utils.py:81: ValueError
